translation: According to Article 25, Paragraph 1, Item (3) of the Provisions of the Supreme People's Court on Several Issues Concerning the Handling of Enforcement Objections and Reconsideration Cases by People's Courts, the ownership of bank deposits shall be determined by the name registered in the account. Currency, as a fungible thing, follows the principle of "possession is ownership." Once transferred into the account of the person subject to enforcement, it is deemed as his/her liable property, and the court may enforce it in accordance with the law.
